description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test suite that runs on push to master and on pull requests. The workflow has four jobs: changed-files, pyright, test, and docs. The changed-files job determines which files have changed. The pyright job runs pyright if source or workflow files have changed. The test job runs tests in a matrix of Python versions and operating systems if source, tests, workflow, or pyproject files have changed. The docs job builds documentation if source, docs, workflow, or pyproject files have changed. A final job uploads a coverage report to Coveralls.
